creator: david@catwhisker.org
text:
New mailing list freebsd-sun4v created; this PR updates docs
accordingly.

How-To-Repeat: Note discrepancy between mailing lists shown at (e.g.)
<http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/handbook/eresources.html#ERESOURCES-MAIL>
vs. those shown at <http://lists.freebsd.org/mailman/listinfo>.
